content: By embedding the 2025 configurable Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) into a distributed Sales Prospecting AI Agent Team, the agent team can autonomously uncover high-value hidden prospect segments that would never be found through rule-based predefined search workflows, driven by intrinsic curiosity instead of explicit labeled lead data. This curiosity-driven prospecting framework redefines outbound sales scalability by turning passive lead qualification into active exploration of untapped market niches.
